examples: Since technology has such an insatiable appetite for eating up human jobs, this phenomenon will continue to restructure our economy in ways we cannot immediately foresee.
There seems to be an insatiable demand for more powerful computers.
Sin, like the cuckoo bird, has an insatiable appetite, and it tries to take over our lives.
With the ease of online trading, retail investors had an insatiable appetite for dot-coms.
Octavian delivered up the tabloid version of an Egyptian queen, insatiable, treacherous and decadent.
